violations.text: Guacamole, sour cream, and pico were observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit in the grill prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Items were placed in ice within the unit to facilitate rapid cooling on the line. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the dining room (main entrance, near bar), are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment MUST be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025
Servers were observed touching the food contact surface of bread tray liners with bare hands. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025
The hand-washing sink in the prep area was lacking paper towels. PIC replaced paper towel during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024
Collander and celery were observed in the hand-washing sink at the bar. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Recently prepared crab bite batter was observed held at 54 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC moved to freezer to rapidly chill. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024

The door to the outside, located in the dining area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC stated door sweeps are on order. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024
Low boy located in the bakery area was not in good repair. Inspector observed the door not fully closing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen at the time of inspection. Inspector provided thermo labels during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the low boy gaskets in the bakery area have an accumulation of dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024
The grease trap at the dish machine was observed leaking. PIC stated the leak is due to the lid not sealing; clamps (to hold lid) are on order. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2024
